texts.label: text
texts.orig: This is for information of all concerned students that Post-Matric and otherScholarship schemesof various categories are open/will be opening soon for fresh application and renewal online through National ScholarshipPortalsfortheyear2022-23.
texts.text: This is for information of all concerned students that Post-Matric and otherScholarship schemesof various categories are open/will be opening soon for fresh application and renewal online through National ScholarshipPortalsfortheyear2022-23.

texts.orig: It is herebyinformed that theonline portal for submission of applications under AlCTE Pragati Scholarship Scheme for girl students（Fresh&Renewal cases),AICTE Saksham Scholarship Scheme for specially-abled students （Fresh&Renewal cases)&AICTESwanathScholarshipScheme（Fresh&Renewal cases)hasbeen opened&lastdate for submissionof online applications is31.10.2022.The detailsofonlineportal forvariousschemesare asfollows:
texts.text: It is herebyinformed that theonline portal for submission of applications under AlCTE Pragati Scholarship Scheme for girl students（Fresh&Renewal cases),AICTE Saksham Scholarship Scheme for specially-abled students （Fresh&Renewal cases)&AICTESwanathScholarshipScheme（Fresh&Renewal cases)hasbeen opened&lastdate for submissionof online applications is31.10.2022.The detailsofonlineportal forvariousschemesare asfollows:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Theguidelinesofeachschemeare available atAiCTEwebsite.Thestudentsmay submit theirFresh&Renewal applications at therespectiveportal.Thestudents are advised tosubmit their online applicationswell in timeso that their institutions areabletoverifyapplicationswithintheprescribed timelines.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Q.1 Who is eligible for PRAGATI Scholarship?
texts.text: Q.1 Who is eligible for PRAGATI Scholarship?

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Ans: Eligibility criteria underPRAGATI Scholarship scheme:
texts.text: Ans: Eligibility criteria underPRAGATI Scholarship scheme:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Q.2 How can I apply for this scholarship?
texts.text: Q.2 How can I apply for this scholarship?

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Ans: The candidate fulfilling the eligibility conditions is required to apply online on National Scholarship Portal (NSP) after initiation of application process and notice to be published on AICTE / NSP website.
texts.text: Ans: The candidate fulfilling the eligibility conditions is required to apply online on National Scholarship Portal (NSP) after initiation of application process and notice to be published on AICTE / NSP website.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Q.3 I am studying in 3rd year of Diploma/ Degree Course. Will I getPragatiScholarship?
texts.text: Q.3 I am studying in 3rd year of Diploma/ Degree Course. Will I getPragatiScholarship?

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Q.7 Eligibility of scholarship when a candidate fails / drops out in subsequent year.
texts.text: Q.7 Eligibility of scholarship when a candidate fails / drops out in subsequent year.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Ans: If a candidate fails / drops out in subsequent year, she will not be eligible for further scholarship.
texts.text: Ans: If a candidate fails / drops out in subsequent year, she will not be eligible for further scholarship.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Q.8 Procedure for renewal of Scholarship under PRAGATI Scheme.
texts.text: Q.8 Procedure for renewal of Scholarship under PRAGATI Scheme.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Ans: The scholarship will be renewed for the next year of study on receipt of renewal through National Scholarship Portal (NSP) by submitting Promotion Certificate duly certified by the Head of Institution in the online portal.
texts.text: Ans: The scholarship will be renewed for the next year of study on receipt of renewal through National Scholarship Portal (NSP) by submitting Promotion Certificate duly certified by the Head of Institution in the online portal.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Q.9 Is there any reservation for SC/ST/OBC Students? What is percentage of reservation for SC/ST/OBC Students?
texts.text: Q.9 Is there any reservation for SC/ST/OBC Students? What is percentage of reservation for SC/ST/OBC Students?

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Ans: As per Government of India norms.
texts.text: Ans: As per Government of India norms.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Q.10 What is the total number of scholarship?
texts.text: Q.10 What is the total number of scholarship?

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Ans : Degree Level (AICTE approved) : 5000& Diploma Level (AICTE approved) : 5000, for23 States/ UT's as per scheme document. In addition to this all eligible students, studying in AICTE approved Institutions Nicobar (UT), Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu (UT), Jammu & Kashmir (UT), Lakshadweep (UT) (Ladakh (UT)are eligible to apply for Pragati Scholarship.
texts.text: Ans : Degree Level (AICTE approved) : 5000& Diploma Level (AICTE approved) : 5000, for23 States/ UT's as per scheme document. In addition to this all eligible students, studying in AICTE approved Institutions Nicobar (UT), Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu (UT), Jammu & Kashmir (UT), Lakshadweep (UT) (Ladakh (UT)are eligible to apply for Pragati Scholarship.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Q.11 What is the Scholarship amount for each Student under PRAGATI Scholarship Scheme?
texts.text: Q.11 What is the Scholarship amount for each Student under PRAGATI Scholarship Scheme?

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Ans: Rs. 50,000.00 per annum for every year of study.
texts.text: Ans: Rs. 50,000.00 per annum for every year of study.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Q.12 What is the mode of disbursement of scholarship?
texts.text: Q.12 What is the mode of disbursement of scholarship?

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Ans: Scholarship will be disbursed only through Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) in the bank account of the student by AICTE. Student must have General Saving Account in his / her name (FRILL/Minor/Joint account will not be accepted).
texts.text: Ans: Scholarship will be disbursed only through Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) in the bank account of the student by AICTE. Student must have General Saving Account in his / her name (FRILL/Minor/Joint account will not be accepted).

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Q.13 Is AADHAAR Card a Mandatory Document PRAGATI Scholarship?
texts.text: Q.13 Is AADHAAR Card a Mandatory Document PRAGATI Scholarship?

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Ans: Yes,Aadhaar card and Aadhaar seeded bank account in the name of candidate is mandatory for submitting online application under PRAGATI scheme.
texts.text: Ans: Yes,Aadhaar card and Aadhaar seeded bank account in the name of candidate is mandatory for submitting online application under PRAGATI scheme.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Q.14 Is there any E-mail (or) Helpline No. for PRAGATI Scholarship Queries?
texts.text: Q.14 Is there any E-mail (or) Helpline No. for PRAGATI Scholarship Queries?

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Ans: Yes, you can avail helpline services on pragati@aicte-india.org&011-29581118 for any query.
texts.text: Ans: Yes, you can avail helpline services on pragati@aicte-india.org&011-29581118 for any query.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Q.15 Whom to contact in case of any difficulties in accessing the Portal for submitting Online Application?
texts.text: Q.15 Whom to contact in case of any difficulties in accessing the Portal for submitting Online Application?

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Ans: You can avail Helpdesk Service on helpdesk@nsp.gov.in for any query.
texts.text: Ans: You can avail Helpdesk Service on helpdesk@nsp.gov.in for any query.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Q.16 What is the opening and closing date for online submission of PRAGATI Scholarship application?
texts.text: Q.16 What is the opening and closing date for online submission of PRAGATI Scholarship application?

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Ans: Please refer to NSP portal for further updates.
texts.text: Ans: Please refer to NSP portal for further updates.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Q.17 Whom to contact after submission of online scholarship application
texts.text: Q.17 Whom to contact after submission of online scholarship application

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Ans: After submission of online scholarship application, students are advised to check all the credentials properly. In case of omissions / errors, immediately contact the institute for rectifying the same. Students are also advised
texts.text: Ans: After submission of online scholarship application, students are advised to check all the credentials properly. In case of omissions / errors, immediately contact the institute for rectifying the same. Students are also advised
